events.title: Rebecca Comay on Mourning Sickness
events.venue: University of Toronto Department of Comparative Literature
events.raw_excerpt: Hand-curated lecture. Comay on melancholia, mourning, and the dialectic of grief as developed in Mourning Sickness: Hegel and the French Revolution.

events.title: Cheryl Misak on Frank Ramsey
events.venue: University of Toronto Department of Philosophy
events.raw_excerpt: Hand-curated lecture. Misak on Frank Ramsey, the Cambridge philosopher whose biography she wrote (Frank Ramsey: A Sheer Excess of Powers, Oxford 2020).

events.title: Sulpicia: Life, Love, and Literature in Ancient Rome
events.venue: Jackman Humanities Building, 170 St. George St.
events.raw_excerpt: Sulpicia: Life, Love, and Literature in Ancient Rome June 9, 2026 You're invited to celebrate the publication of Sulpicia: Life, Love, and Literature in Ancient Rome , by Alison Keith.
